requirement_results.title: Rules of Engagement (RoE) Specification and Validation
requirement_results.rationale: antifragile-ai exposes an attack registry but no formal Rules-of-Engagement artefact yet; campaign-history records intent but the RoE per-engagement file is on the roadmap.

requirement_results.title: IP Range Validation and RFC 1918 Awareness
requirement_results.rationale: Pre-send DNS re-check and RFC 1918 / metadata-IP rejection close the SSRF TOCTOU window on /security-scan/scan-live (#186, #317).

requirement_results.title: Domain Scope Validation and Wildcard Handling
requirement_results.rationale: Domain-scope validation rejects wildcards and out-of-scope hosts via the same SSRF helper before the live executor dispatches.

requirement_results.title: Temporal Boundary and Timezone Handling
requirement_results.rationale: Campaign scheduler honours cron windows but doesn't yet enforce a per-engagement timezone-aware temporal boundary; documented gap.

requirement_results.title: Asset Criticality Classification and Integration
requirement_results.rationale: No first-class asset criticality classification today — closest analogue is Annex III risk tiering, which is system-level, not asset-level.

requirement_results.title: Pre-Action Scope Validation
requirement_results.rationale: Every live attack runs through `_security_scan_validators` BEFORE the live executor; pre-action scope check is mandatory.

requirement_results.title: Dynamic Scope Monitoring and Drift Detection
requirement_results.rationale: campaign_scheduler triggers recurring runs but doesn't compare against a baseline scope to detect drift; tracked as a follow-up.

requirement_results.title: Temporal Scope Compliance Monitoring
requirement_results.rationale: Engagement timestamps are recorded on every evidence-chain entry; an engagement-window enforcement gate is partial.

requirement_results.title: Hard Deny Lists and Critical Asset Protection
requirement_results.rationale: SSRF helpers carry a hard deny list (RFC 1918, link-local, cloud-metadata IPs); critical-asset protection enforced pre-dispatch.

requirement_results.title: Production Database Safeguards
requirement_results.rationale: Live executor targets only test endpoints; production-DB safeguards rely on operator scope discipline rather than an automated gate.

requirement_results.title: Multi-Tenant Environment Awareness
requirement_results.rationale: Tenant-scoped end-to-end since #178/#180/#323; every engagement, evidence row, and audit-trail read filters by tenant_id.

requirement_results.title: DNS Rebinding Attack Prevention
requirement_results.rationale: DNS-rebinding mitigation: pre-send DNS re-check on /security-scan/scan-live closes the TOCTOU window (#186).

requirement_results.title: Network Boundary and Lateral Movement Enforcement
requirement_results.rationale: Egress allowlist + RFC1918 deny + cloud-metadata reject enforce a hard network boundary against lateral movement.

requirement_results.title: Network Topology Discovery Limitations
requirement_results.rationale: No explicit network-topology-discovery rate limiter beyond the slowapi default; documented gap.

requirement_results.title: Scope Enforcement Audit and Compliance Verification
requirement_results.rationale: Evidence chain logs every campaign action with hash-chained tamper evidence; scope audits are reproducible offline.

requirement_results.title: Scope Refresh and Revalidation Cycle
requirement_results.rationale: Campaign re-runs reload scope from the registry but a formal scope-revalidation cycle is not yet implemented.

requirement_results.title: Engagement Boundary Definition for Recurring Tests
requirement_results.rationale: campaign_scheduler ships engagement boundaries for recurring tests with persistence in `CampaignSchedule`.

requirement_results.title: Cross-Cycle Finding Correlation and Regression Detection
requirement_results.rationale: campaign_history surfaces fragility red flags across runs but cross-cycle regression detection is heuristic.

requirement_results.title: Rate Limiting, Adaptive Backoff, and Production Impact Controls
requirement_results.rationale: slowapi rate limiter + DailyQuotaLimiter + adaptive backoff on every state-mutating route.

requirement_results.title: Deployment-Triggered Testing Governance
requirement_results.rationale: No PR-triggered or deployment-triggered scan governance; closest analogue is the GitHub Connect manual scan path.

requirement_results.title: Scope Conflict Resolution for Overlapping Engagements
requirement_results.rationale: Scope conflict resolution for overlapping engagements is a Tier-3 SHOULD; not implemented today.

requirement_results.title: Client-Side Agent Scope and Safety Boundaries
requirement_results.rationale: Frontend agent surface (Workflow Builder + CC) constrains client-side actions but no formal client-side agent boundary contract.

requirement_results.title: Credential and Secret Lifecycle Governance
requirement_results.rationale: Per-user secrets stored Fernet-encrypted with rotation key support; Argon2id for passwords; sha256 hash for API keys; rotation runbook in `docs/security/rotation-log.md`.

requirement_results.title: Cloud-Native and Ephemeral Infrastructure Governance
requirement_results.rationale: Railway-managed cloud hosting + R2 evidence backend; ephemeral-infra governance is partial (no per-pod isolation enforcement gate).

requirement_results.title: API-First and Business Logic Testing Governance
requirement_results.rationale: Code Scanner's API analyzer + business-logic analyzers cover the static surface; runtime API governance is partial.

requirement_results.title: Out-of-Distribution Action Monitoring
requirement_results.rationale: Out-of-distribution action monitoring is a Tier-2 SHOULD; not implemented (no behavioural baseline + drift detector for attack actions today).

requirement_results.title: Impact Classification and CIA Scoring
requirement_results.rationale: antifragile-ai's attack classifier scores impact across CIA dimensions and writes the verdict to the chain.

requirement_results.title: Industry-Specific Impact Considerations
requirement_results.rationale: Annex III sector + KB dimensions encode some industry-specific risk weighting; per-industry impact pre-set is partial.

requirement_results.title: Real-World Impact Classification Examples
requirement_results.rationale: Real-world impact classification examples are a Tier-2 SHOULD documentation deliverable; not yet shipped as a curated reference.

requirement_results.title: Rate Limiting, Bandwidth, and Payload Constraints
requirement_results.rationale: Per-route slowapi limits + bandwidth-bound payload caps (250 MB scan upload, 20 MB evidence ingest, 5 MB per-file).

requirement_results.title: Cascading Failure Prevention in Interconnected Systems
requirement_results.rationale: Cascading-failure prevention in interconnected systems is a Tier-2 SHOULD; partial via DLQ for Stripe but no cross-system circuit breaker.

requirement_results.title: Threshold Escalation Workflow (Automated → Approval → Prohibited)
requirement_results.rationale: Three-agent verifier triad (Finder/Adversary/Referee) escalates uncertain verdicts; threshold-driven Automated→Approval→Prohibited transitions are partial.

requirement_results.title: Cumulative Risk Scoring with Time-Based Decay
requirement_results.rationale: antifragility score accumulates from stressors but doesn't decay over time; cumulative-risk-with-decay is partial.

requirement_results.title: Threshold Configuration with Schema Validation
requirement_results.rationale: Threshold configuration with formal schema validation is a Tier-3 SHOULD; not yet shipped.

requirement_results.title: Kill Switch
requirement_results.rationale: TENANT_LOCKS allows per-tenant kill of a refinement run; a global platform kill switch is documented but operator-driven (not API-exposed).

requirement_results.title: Health Check Monitoring, Threshold Adjustment, and Automatic Halt
requirement_results.rationale: /healthz + /healthz/llm health checks; Railway health probe halts unhealthy boots; alembic 30s timeout + runtime kb_version backstop.

requirement_results.title: Condition-Based Automated Termination
requirement_results.rationale: Roadmap refiner has condition-based early-stop (no_improvement >= 5); broader condition-based termination across other engines is partial.

requirement_results.title: Network-Level Circuit Breaker
requirement_results.rationale: DailyQuotaLimiter (5 iters / 50K tokens for Starter) acts as a per-tenant network circuit breaker for LLM calls.

requirement_results.title: Time-Based Automatic Termination with Operator Override
requirement_results.rationale: Time-based automatic termination with operator override is a Tier-3 SHOULD; not yet shipped.

requirement_results.title: Reversible Action Tracking and Rollback
requirement_results.rationale: Pentests are non-reversible by design; rollback semantics for stateful attacks aren't applicable but the requirement isn't met.

requirement_results.title: Post-Test System Integrity Validation
requirement_results.rationale: Three-agent verifier triad confirms post-test that the system stayed within scope; integrity validation against a pre-test baseline is partial.

requirement_results.title: Evidence Preservation and Automated Cleanup
requirement_results.rationale: All evidence persisted via hash-chained `AuditStore.record`; cleanup is GDPR Art. 17 tombstone (never silent delete).

requirement_results.title: External Watchdog and Operator Notification
requirement_results.rationale: External watchdog + operator notification is a separate observability process not bundled today.

requirement_results.title: Incident Containment and Recovery
requirement_results.rationale: Stripe webhook DLQ + alembic 008 (`failed_webhook_events`) captures transient failures for replay; broader incident-containment runbook is partial.

requirement_results.title: Execution Sandbox and Containment Boundary Integrity
requirement_results.rationale: antifragile-ai attacks run in-process; execution sandbox isolation is partial (no cgroup/namespace boundary).

requirement_results.title: Action Allowlist Enforcement External to the Model
requirement_results.rationale: Defense registry + attack registry constrain the action surface external to the LLM; LLM never picks unconstrained tools.

requirement_results.title: Mandatory Pre-Approval Gates for Autonomy Levels L1 and L2
requirement_results.rationale: Workflow Builder Gated Response (HITL) nodes + the 12-factor oversight Factor 6+7 substrate enforce pre-approval gates.

requirement_results.title: Real-Time Monitoring and Intervention Capability
requirement_results.rationale: antifragile.oversight.event_store ships per-run hash-chained event logging; CC + Workflow Builder progress overlay surface live state.

requirement_results.title: Decision Timeout and Default-Safe Behavior
requirement_results.rationale: Workflow gates default-deny on TTL expiry; tenant lock release on exception; 5s Turnstile verification timeout.

requirement_results.title: Authority Delegation Matrix
requirement_results.rationale: RequiredRole lattice (provider/deployer/human_overseer/security_officer/data_steward/ai_agent) defines who can sign off which gate.

requirement_results.title: Delegation Chain-of-Custody and Decision Audit Trail
requirement_results.rationale: Audit chain captures actor + delegation; passport stamps record signed attestations from compliance officers + auditors with cryptographic hashes.

requirement_results.title: Graceful Pause Mechanism with State Preservation
requirement_results.rationale: Workflow Builder run state persists between page loads; full graceful pause + state-preserve mid-run is partial.

requirement_results.title: Mid-Engagement Redirect Capability
requirement_results.rationale: Workflow Builder allows mid-run config edits via InputConfigPanel; mid-engagement redirect for live attacks is partial.

requirement_results.title: Immediate Kill Switch with State Dump
requirement_results.rationale: Per-tenant kill via TENANT_LOCKS release; full state-dump on kill is partial (chain captures actions but not in-flight LLM context).

requirement_results.title: Multi-Operator Kill Switch Authority and Handoff
requirement_results.rationale: Multi-operator kill-switch authority + handoff is a Tier-2 MUST; only single-operator kill is implemented today.

requirement_results.title: Mandatory Human Decision Points Before Irreversible Actions
requirement_results.rationale: Gated Response nodes block irreversible actions until a registered reviewer signs off; reviewerNotes persist to evidence chain.

requirement_results.title: Unexpected Findings Escalation Framework
requirement_results.rationale: Three-agent triad escalates contested findings to the Adjudicator; broader unexpected-finding escalation framework is partial.

requirement_results.title: Impact Threshold Breach Escalation
requirement_results.rationale: Antifragility score thresholds drive the CC HUD pulse; impact-threshold breach escalation is partial.

requirement_results.title: Confidence-Based Escalation (Scope Uncertainty)
requirement_results.rationale: Annex III boundary indicators (#460) flag low-confidence classifications + route to Officer Mode review.

requirement_results.title: Legal and Compliance Escalation Triggers
requirement_results.rationale: Risk Register + Officer Mode + Auditor stamps cover legal + compliance escalation triggers (Art. 14, Art. 27 FRIA, Art. 50, Art. 72).

requirement_results.title: Real-Time Activity Monitoring and Multi-Channel Notification
requirement_results.rationale: WebhookOversightChannel ships HMAC-signed multi-channel notification; alert routing across email + Slack + webhook is partial.

requirement_results.title: Alert Fatigue Mitigation and Smart Aggregation
requirement_results.rationale: Alert fatigue mitigation + smart aggregation is a Tier-2 SHOULD; not yet shipped.

requirement_results.title: Stakeholder Notification and Engagement Closure
requirement_results.rationale: Compliance Gap Report PDF + cancellation email + trial-reminder cron cover stakeholder notification; engagement-closure summary is partial.

requirement_results.title: Operator Qualification, Training, and Competency Governance
requirement_results.rationale: AI Literacy agent + the Officer Mode role-aware UI gate operator competency; admin MFA enforcement requires post-2026-04-25 SOC 2 controls.

requirement_results.title: 24/7 Operational Continuity and Shift Handoff
requirement_results.rationale: 24/7 operational continuity + shift handoff is a Tier-2 SHOULD; not yet documented.

requirement_results.title: Single Technique Execution
requirement_results.rationale: antifragile-ai dispatches one technique at a time via the registry; the live executor never auto-chains.

requirement_results.title: Human-Directed Target and Technique Selection
requirement_results.rationale: Workflow Builder + Security Scan UI require human selection of target + technique before dispatch.

requirement_results.title: Parameter Configuration by Human Operator
requirement_results.rationale: InputConfigPanel + Security Scan parameter sliders give the operator full parameter control before run.

requirement_results.title: No Automated Chaining or Sequential Decision-Making
requirement_results.rationale: L1 dispatch is single-step; attack_chain.py supports multi-step but only when explicitly selected — no silent auto-chain at L1.

requirement_results.title: Mandatory Logging and Human-Reviewable Audit Trail
requirement_results.rationale: Hash-chained evidence on every dispatch; audit-trail isolation from the agent runtime via separate Postgres + R2.

requirement_results.title: Basic Scope Validation and Policy Enforcement
requirement_results.rationale: Pre-action validators run on every campaign route; policy enforcement is mandatory not optional.

requirement_results.title: Multi-Step Technique Chaining Within Single Phase
requirement_results.rationale: attack_chain.py + Workflow Builder DAG support multi-step technique chaining within a single phase.

requirement_results.title: Real-Time Human Monitoring and Approval Gates
requirement_results.rationale: Workflow Gated Response nodes provide approval gates; CC agent progress overlay streams live state to the operator.

requirement_results.title: Tool-Proposed Actions with Operator Modification Capability
requirement_results.rationale: Workflow Builder lets the operator edit any agent's input config (T2 SHOULD); roadmap refinement panel offers operator-modifiable target coverage.

requirement_results.title: Step-by-Step Audit Log with Phase Transitions
requirement_results.rationale: Per-iteration `roadmap_refiner.iteration_started/completed` + `iteration_rejected/accepted` logs are the canonical step-by-step audit trail.

requirement_results.title: Escalation Triggers and Exception Handling
requirement_results.rationale: Three-agent verifier escalates contested findings; full escalation-trigger taxonomy is partial.

requirement_results.title: Kill Switch and Pause Capability
requirement_results.rationale: TENANT_LOCKS allow per-tenant pause; UI-driven kill from CC is a planned follow-up.

requirement_results.title: Complete Attack Chain Execution Within Boundaries
requirement_results.rationale: attack_chain ranking enforces boundary checks; full chains never exceed registered scope.

requirement_results.title: Boundary Definition and Enforcement Framework
requirement_results.rationale: Attack registry + defense registry are immutable per-deployment and define the runtime boundary.

requirement_results.title: Pre-Approved Action Categories and Decision Trees
requirement_results.rationale: Defense registry + per-axis Cybersec categories pre-approve action categories; no model-free-form dispatch.

requirement_results.title: Continuous Boundary Monitoring and Breach Detection
requirement_results.rationale: campaign_history monitors for fragility red flags across runs; per-run continuous boundary monitoring is partial.

requirement_results.title: Multi-Target Assessment Management
requirement_results.rationale: Portfolio + CC inventory cover multi-system management; multi-target campaign management at L3 is partial.

requirement_results.title: Incident Response During Autonomous Testing
requirement_results.rationale: Stripe webhook DLQ pattern is the closest analogue; pentest-incident response is partial.

requirement_results.title: Multi-Target Campaign Management Without Intervention
requirement_results.rationale: Multi-target campaign management without intervention is a Tier-3 SHOULD; not yet shipped.

requirement_results.title: Dynamic Scope Adjustment and Target Discovery
requirement_results.rationale: Dynamic scope adjustment + target discovery is intentionally NOT shipped — APTS itself flags scope drift as the primary risk for autonomous platforms.

requirement_results.title: Adaptive Testing Strategy and Resource Reallocation
requirement_results.rationale: Karpathy-inspired Autocompliance Loop adapts roadmap proposals to coverage gap; broader resource reallocation is partial.

requirement_results.title: Continuous Risk Assessment and Automated Escalation
requirement_results.rationale: Continuous risk auto-escalation at L4 is a Tier-3 SHOULD; not yet shipped.

requirement_results.title: Complete Audit Trail and Forensic Reconstruction
requirement_results.rationale: Hash-chained evidence + AppendOnlyEventStore replay support full forensic reconstruction.

requirement_results.title: Periodic Autonomous Review Cycles
requirement_results.rationale: Periodic autonomous review cycles are a Tier-3 SHOULD; campaign_scheduler covers the cron half but not the review-cycle half.

requirement_results.title: Autonomy Level Authorization, Transition, and Reauthorization
requirement_results.rationale: Tier gates on LLM-cost paths + admin MFA enforcement act as authorization gates; formal autonomy-level transition workflow is partial.

requirement_results.title: Incident Investigation and Autonomy Level Adjustment
requirement_results.rationale: Incident investigation + autonomy-level adjustment is a Tier-2 MUST; not yet shipped as a structured workflow.

requirement_results.title: Evasion and Stealth Mode Governance
requirement_results.rationale: Evasion + stealth-mode governance is a Tier-3 SHOULD intentionally avoided — the platform never operates in stealth.

requirement_results.title: Containment Verification for L3 and L4 Autonomy
requirement_results.rationale: L3/L4 containment verification is a Tier-3 MUST; not yet shipped because L3/L4 autonomy is not enabled.

requirement_results.title: Structured Event Logging with Schema Validation
requirement_results.rationale: structlog-emitted events + Pydantic-validated evidence payloads provide schema-validated structured logs.

requirement_results.title: State Transition Logging
requirement_results.rationale: State transitions logged on every workflow node + every refinement iteration + every authentication event.

requirement_results.title: Resource Utilization Metrics Logging
requirement_results.rationale: Prometheus integration captures basic metrics; full per-engagement resource utilisation is partial.

requirement_results.title: Decision Point Logging and Confidence Scoring
requirement_results.rationale: Three-agent verifier outputs Wilson-CI confidence per finding; iteration-level decision points logged via #412 telemetry.

requirement_results.title: Log Retention and Archival Requirements
requirement_results.rationale: R2 EU evidence backend + audit-chain in Postgres; documented 10-year retention plan for Object Lock upgrade.

requirement_results.title: Decision Chain of Reasoning and Alternative Evaluation
requirement_results.rationale: ComplianceRewardHackDetector logs origin (registry_lift / recombination / agent_novel) + rejection reason; broader chain-of-reasoning capture is partial.

requirement_results.title: Risk Assessment Documentation Before Action Execution
requirement_results.rationale: campaign_history records pre-action risk assessment for every campaign; reflected in antifragility score before dispatch.

requirement_results.title: Context-Aware Decision Logging
requirement_results.rationale: Per-iteration logs carry tenant_id + run_id + audit_result_id + KB version; context-aware decisions throughout.

requirement_results.title: Transparency Report Requirements
requirement_results.rationale: MITRE ATLAS RDF/Turtle + JSON-LD export per campaign (#485); narrative layer publishes per-system + per-obligation prose.

requirement_results.title: Cryptographic Hashing of All Evidence
requirement_results.rationale: SHA-256 hash on every evidence chain entry; canonical JSON form prevents serialisation drift.

requirement_results.title: Chain of Custody for Evidence
requirement_results.rationale: Evidence chain captures the actor on every entry; never derived from request payload (#180 actor-spoof hardening).

requirement_results.title: Tamper-Evident Logging with Hash Chains
requirement_results.rationale: Hash-chained evidence chain detects any tampered row; AppendOnlyEventStore mirrors the same algorithm for oversight events.

requirement_results.title: RFC 3161 Trusted Timestamp Integration
requirement_results.rationale: RFC 3161 trusted-timestamp integration is a Tier-3 SHOULD; not yet shipped.

requirement_results.title: Screenshot and Packet Capture Evidence Standards
requirement_results.rationale: Screenshot + packet-capture evidence standards are a Tier-2 MUST; the platform records prose + JSON evidence but not raw network captures.

requirement_results.title: Evidence Classification and Sensitive Data Handling
requirement_results.rationale: PII linter + canonical JSON hashing scrub sensitive data before chain inclusion; classification levels per-row.

requirement_results.title: Platform Integrity and Supply Chain Attestation
requirement_results.rationale: Dependabot-pinned dependencies + SBOM-emitting builds; full supply-chain attestation per release is partial.

requirement_results.title: Safety Control Regression Testing After Platform Updates
requirement_results.rationale: tests/test_security.py + TestSecurityMiddleware + TestSSRFPrevention + TestRateLimiting form the safety-control regression suite.

requirement_results.title: Customer Notification for Behavior-Affecting Updates
requirement_results.rationale: Trial-reminder + cancellation email + Resend transactional layer cover behaviour-change customer notifications.

requirement_results.title: AI/ML Model Change Tracking and Drift Detection
requirement_results.rationale: continuous_compliance + drift_reassessment emit drift_bundle_staleness on Mistral / KB drift; KB version stamped on every materialisation (#525).

requirement_results.title: Audit Trail Isolation from the Agent Runtime
requirement_results.rationale: Evidence chain runs in a separate Postgres instance + R2 bucket; the agent runtime can append but cannot redact.

requirement_results.title: Instruction Boundary Enforcement
requirement_results.rationale: prompt_guard.sanitize_for_llm strips demarcation tags + enforces instruction boundaries on every LLM input.

requirement_results.title: Response Validation & Sanitization
requirement_results.rationale: Security middleware scans + sanitises responses; PII linter pass before publication.

requirement_results.title: Error Message Neutrality
requirement_results.rationale: Error sanitiser flattens HTTPException details; never leaks internal paths or stack traces (#427 contract).

requirement_results.title: Configuration File Integrity Verification
requirement_results.rationale: Pinned settings via pydantic-settings + git-tracked configs; runtime integrity check is partial.

requirement_results.title: Authority Claim Detection & Rejection
requirement_results.rationale: prompt_guard rejects authority-claim patterns (system: / admin: / developer:) in user input.

requirement_results.title: Decision Boundary Enforcement
requirement_results.rationale: Hard tier gates + admin MFA + tenant scoping enforce decision boundaries; broader decision-boundary stress test is partial.

requirement_results.title: Redirect Following Policy
requirement_results.rationale: SSRF helpers reject 3xx redirects to private/metadata IPs after re-resolution; no follow-redirect on the live executor path.

requirement_results.title: DNS and Network-Level Redirect Prevention
requirement_results.rationale: DNS rebinding closed via pre-send DNS re-check (#186); the validator caches the resolved IP and rejects mid-attack DNS flips.

requirement_results.title: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) Prevention in Testing
requirement_results.rationale: SSRF prevention end-to-end on /security-scan/scan-live; same helper applied across all outbound HTTP paths.

requirement_results.title: Scope Expansion Social Engineering Prevention
requirement_results.rationale: prompt_guard + middleware reject scope-expansion social engineering attempts in attacker payloads.

requirement_results.title: Out-of-Band Communication Prevention
requirement_results.rationale: Egress allowlist + per-tenant network boundary prevent OOB DNS / HTTP exfiltration via attack payloads.

requirement_results.title: Immutable Scope Enforcement Architecture
requirement_results.rationale: Attack registry + scope helpers are immutable per-deployment + signed; the LLM cannot extend scope at runtime.

requirement_results.title: Adversarial Example Detection in Vulnerability Classification
requirement_results.rationale: Three-agent verifier triad (Finder + Adversary + Referee) is the structured adversarial-example check on every flagged finding.

requirement_results.title: Resource Exhaustion and Tarpit Attack Prevention
requirement_results.rationale: slowapi per-route limits + DailyQuotaLimiter + 5s Turnstile timeout + 250 MB upload cap prevent resource exhaustion + tarpits.

requirement_results.title: Deceptive Authentication Honeypots
requirement_results.rationale: Canary honeytoken patterns in router_attacks; broader deceptive-auth honeypot coverage is partial.

requirement_results.title: Anti-Automation Defense Detection
requirement_results.rationale: Cloudflare Turnstile on 5 unauth state-mutating endpoints (#228); telemetry on render failures + verified-bad tokens via #df811c4.

requirement_results.title: Anomaly Detection in Response Patterns
requirement_results.rationale: Wilson CI bound + fragility red flags act as response-pattern anomaly signals; full dedicated anomaly detector is partial.

requirement_results.title: AI Model Input/Output Architectural Boundary
requirement_results.rationale: prompt_guard wraps every Mistral / LLM call; the model never sees raw operator input + never returns raw output to other tools.

requirement_results.title: Discovered Credential Protection
requirement_results.rationale: gitleaks + bandit + Fernet-encrypted token storage; GITHUB_CONNECT_ENCRYPTION_KEY supports rotation.

requirement_results.title: Adversarial Validation and Resilience Testing of Safety Controls
requirement_results.rationale: campaign_history's antifragility score is the documented adversarial-validation methodology; every confirmed gap increases it.

requirement_results.title: Data Isolation Adversarial Testing
requirement_results.rationale: TestEvidenceTenantScoping covers cross-tenant adversarial probes + admin_can_bypass_tenant gate; per-tenant isolation pinned.

requirement_results.title: Inter-Model Trust Boundaries and Output Validation
requirement_results.rationale: Three-agent verifier is the inter-model trust boundary; full inter-LLM mediator is partial.

requirement_results.title: Agent Runtime as an Untrusted Component
requirement_results.rationale: Agent runtime is treated as untrusted: every input through middleware, every outbound through validators, evidence chain in separate process.

requirement_results.title: Third-Party Provider Selection and Vetting
requirement_results.rationale: Subprocessors page lists every third-party with vetting status; sub-processor disclosure is GDPR Art. 28 compliant.

requirement_results.title: Model Version Pinning and Change Management
requirement_results.rationale: Mistral model version pinning via env var; `MISTRAL_MODEL` documented; runbook covers manual rollback path.

requirement_results.title: API Security and Authentication
requirement_results.rationale: Security Hub API keys + OAuth + JWT + Argon2id passwords + admin TOTP MFA cover API security baseline.

requirement_results.title: Provider Availability, SLA Management, and Failover
requirement_results.rationale: Mistral provider has retry on 429/5xx + structured logging; formal SLA + automated failover to Anthropic is partial.

requirement_results.title: Provider Incident Response, Breach Notification, and Mid-Engagement Compromise
requirement_results.rationale: Stripe webhook DLQ pattern + alembic 008 + provider-incident runbook (`docs/security/2026-04-20-vercel-incident-response.md`) cover provider compromise.

requirement_results.title: Dependency Inventory, Risk Assessment, and Supply Chain Verification
requirement_results.rationale: Dependabot pinned + grouped weekly + daily security; bandit + pip-audit in CI; .gitleaks.toml for secret scanning.

requirement_results.title: Data Residency and Sovereignty Requirements
requirement_results.rationale: EU residency end-to-end: R2 EU jurisdiction + Mistral Paris + Supabase EU + Railway EU-West.

requirement_results.title: Cloud Security Configuration and Hardening
requirement_results.rationale: Security headers middleware (CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options); Cloudflare front-door; Vercel security headers in `vercel.json` (#317).

requirement_results.title: Incident Response and Service Continuity Planning
requirement_results.rationale: Provider-incident runbook covers the rotation + disclosure flow; full BCP/DR exercise cadence is partial.

requirement_results.title: Vulnerability Feed Selection and Management
requirement_results.rationale: MITRE ATLAS + OWASP AI Exchange catalogs vendored + pinned (#417, #485); broader vuln-feed inventory is partial.

requirement_results.title: Feed Quality Assurance and Incident Response
requirement_results.rationale: Feed-quality assurance + incident response on a corrupted feed is a Tier-2 SHOULD; not yet shipped.

requirement_results.title: Client Data Classification Framework
requirement_results.rationale: Tenant-scoped end-to-end + PII linter classifies sensitive fields before publication; canonical data classification framework documented in DPA + Privacy.

requirement_results.title: Sensitive Data Discovery and Handling
requirement_results.rationale: PII linter detects + masks 7 sensitive entity types (PERSON, EMAIL, IP, etc.); narrative layer never publishes raw PII.

requirement_results.title: Data Encryption and Cryptographic Controls
requirement_results.rationale: TLS everywhere + Argon2id passwords + Fernet token encryption + R2 SSE-S3 at rest; security/headers HSTS preload.

requirement_results.title: Data Retention and Secure Deletion
requirement_results.rationale: GDPR Art. 17 tenant-tombstone (#201/#202); R2 backend wires `delete_payload` (#434) for actual byte deletion when permitted.

requirement_results.title: Data Destruction Proof and Certification
requirement_results.rationale: Tombstone + chain replay covers most of T3 destruction proof; cryptographic certificate-of-destruction is partial.

requirement_results.title: Multi-Tenant and Engagement Isolation
requirement_results.rationale: Tenant-scoping covers every read + write + delete path; admin_can_bypass_tenant requires MFA enrolment (SOC 2 Bet 1).

requirement_results.title: Tenant Breach Notification
requirement_results.rationale: Vercel-incident runbook documents tenant breach notification; Resend transactional layer is the canonical channel.

requirement_results.title: AI Model Provenance and Training Data Governance
requirement_results.rationale: Mistral training-data commitment surfaced in /legal/subprocessors + DPA; no customer data flows into training.

requirement_results.title: Persistent Memory and Retrieval State Governance
requirement_results.rationale: Narrative materialise + canonical JSON `source_row_hash` give per-row state attestation; full retrieval-state governance is partial.

requirement_results.title: Foundation Model Disclosure and Capability Baseline
requirement_results.rationale: Mistral foundation model disclosed in /legal/subprocessors + Privacy + DPA; capability baseline documented in `docs/operations/mistral-runbook.md`.

requirement_results.title: Re-attestation on Material Foundation Model Change
requirement_results.rationale: Mistral version pin + change-management runbook; automated re-attestation on model change is partial.

requirement_results.title: Evidence-Based Finding Validation
requirement_results.rationale: Three-agent verifier triad confirms every gap; `ComplianceGap` carries supporting evidence references end-to-end.

requirement_results.title: Finding Verification and Human Review Pipeline
requirement_results.rationale: Workflow Builder Gated Response nodes + Risk Register lifecycle (open → mitigated → accepted_risk) cover human review.

requirement_results.title: Confidence Scoring with Auditable Methodology
requirement_results.rationale: Wilson confidence interval bound on resilience score; Mistral request_done logs prompt + completion tokens; methodology is auditor-walkable.

requirement_results.title: Finding Provenance Chain
requirement_results.rationale: NodeProvenance enum (#524) + `EvidenceCitation` carry the full chain from regulator-authoritative text to llm_inferred proposals.

requirement_results.title: Cryptographic Evidence Chain Integrity
requirement_results.rationale: SHA-256 hash chain on every evidence entry; AppendOnlyEventStore mirrors the algorithm for oversight events.

requirement_results.title: False Positive Rate Disclosure
requirement_results.rationale: Three-agent triad rejects false positives via the Adversary phase; aggregate FP-rate disclosure per-engagement is partial.

requirement_results.title: Independent Finding Reproducibility
requirement_results.rationale: Hash-chained evidence + canonical JSON support reproducibility; independent third-party reproduction not yet a published deliverable.

requirement_results.title: Vulnerability Coverage Disclosure
requirement_results.rationale: Code Scanner publishes 21 analyzer coverage; Cybersec Agents Hub catalog discloses provider coverage; per-engagement coverage disclosure is partial.

requirement_results.title: False Negative Rate Disclosure and Methodology
requirement_results.rationale: False-negative rate disclosure + methodology is a Tier-2 MUST; not yet shipped.

requirement_results.title: Detection Effectiveness Benchmarking
requirement_results.rationale: Detection-effectiveness benchmarking is a Tier-3 SHOULD; not yet shipped.

requirement_results.title: Executive Summary and Risk Overview
requirement_results.rationale: Compliance Gap Report PDF (Bet 4 #230) ships an executive-summary section per system; risk overview is the headline page.

requirement_results.title: Remediation Guidance and Prioritization
requirement_results.rationale: Roadmap tasks include Claude Code prompts + acceptance criteria + output files + dependencies + lifecycle phase + deadline anchors.

requirement_results.title: Engagement SLA Compliance Reporting
requirement_results.rationale: Engagement scheduler tracks recurring runs; SLA-compliance reporting per engagement is partial.

requirement_results.title: Trend Analysis for Recurring Engagements
requirement_results.rationale: campaign_history surfaces trend analysis with antifragility score deltas across recurring campaigns.

requirement_results.title: Downstream Finding Pipeline Integrity
requirement_results.rationale: MITRE ATLAS RDF/Turtle + JSON-LD export per campaign (#485); narrative layer publishes per-system + per-obligation prose; downstream consumers can consume both.
